name: repo-analyzer
description: Deep architectural analysis of open-source projects with professional reports

interface.shortDescription: Deep architectural analysis for open-source repositories
interface.longDescription: Analyze open-source repositories and produce a source-backed architecture report with design insights, trade-offs, Mermaid diagrams, and optional Graphify structure navigation.
defaultPrompt: Analyze the architecture of this repository
Compare the design of two open-source projects
Produce a source-backed architecture report for this codebase
